seoTitle: Throsby vs Torrens — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Throsby and Torrens. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Throsby and Torrens.
heading: Throsby vs Torrens — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Throsby, Australian Capital Territory and Torrens, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Throsby has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Torrens (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Throsby or Torrens safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Throsby has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Torrens scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Throsby scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Torrens scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Throsby or Torrens?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Throsby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
